'''Borun Call''' was an infamous [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] active since the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. He was responsible for introducing [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] to the [[Slavery/Legends|slave trade]]. When Gardi was briefly captured by [[Tauran Nartal]], Call rescued his former partner and captured Nartal in the process.<ref name="SWAJ8">{{JournalCite|8|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref> Call also aided the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in enslaving the [[Talz/Legends|Talz]] of [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]].<ref name="AJ10" />

==Biography==
Call grew up in [[Sar Galva]] on [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Calamari]]. Arrested and imprisoned, he used his natural skills at leadership to be appointed to labor crew coordinator and develop as a slaver. Once free, he became one of the most notorious slavers in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland regions]]. He participated in the [[Zygerian Conference]] and would often form alliances with other slavers to increase his profits.<ref name="AJ10" />

After Gardi captured two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] who were [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives, Tauran Nartal investigated and confronted Call in [[Jinorota City]] on [[Werncin 3]]. Call was able to incapacitate and capture the New Republic operative. He sold him to representatives of the [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] mines and continued his business of capturing sentients. Call worked around the [[Listehol Run/Legends|Listehol Run]] and continued to operate in the [[Imperial Remnant]] territory.<ref name="AJ10" />

==Equipment==
Call owned a [[Sydon Vehicle Works]] [[MRX-BR Pacifier]] called the [[Vanquisher (MRX-BR Pacifier)|''Vanquisher'']], which served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of his slaving [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].<ref name="AJ10" />
